message:
refactor(storage): use rusqlite_test_fixture_conn helper in legacy-fts test

Continues the test-side rusqlite → frankensqlite migration pattern
(see recent efdaef4b and c7cbf431): swap the bare
rusqlite::Connection::open() call in the duplicate-legacy-fts-schema
test case for the shared rusqlite_test_fixture_conn() helper so it
picks up the same pragma/tokenizer setup as the other fixture paths.

Single-line change. The helper already unwraps, so error handling is
unchanged.
